payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped multicolored floral rug with a blue border and red, white and yellow flower motifs on a textured woven/tufted pile, visible at the corner next to a hardwood floor; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m away).
